DataRequest.techniqueName: Endpoint Denial of Service: OS Exhaustion Flood
DataRequest.Name: Server Disk Space Critical / SCW
DataRequest.Description: Detects that server disk space usage has reached a critical level (greater than 95% and free disk less than 100 MB) based on 2 successive readings in a 10 minute interval
DataRequest.Remediation: Identify the largest files consuming most disk space and delete them. Or, enlarge the disk. If it is an OS disk, then the system may stop working if this problem is not taken care of.
DataRequest.DataSource: Windows Performance Monitoring via OMI or FortiSIEM Agent, Linux via SNMP

SubPattern.name: ServDiskCrit
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: eventType="PH_DEV_MON_SYS_DISK_UTIL" AND hostIpAddr IN (Device@backups%2dprod.sibscyberwatch.com,Device@cluster,Device@forticollector,Device@fsm%2dworker02.mcic.prod,Device@fsm%2dworker.mcic.prod,Device@HOST%2d10.200.20.1,Device@haproxy,Device@rtir,Device@soc%2ddb) AND diskName NOT IN ("/boot")

IncidentDef.ArgList: hostIpAddr = ServDiskCrit.hostIpAddr,hostName = ServDiskCrit.hostName,diskName = ServDiskCrit.diskName,diskUtil = ServDiskCrit.AVG(diskUtil),freeDiskMB = ServDiskCrit.AVG(freeDiskMB)
